title: Paw Patrol: Air Rescue Toy Figures Gift Pack, with 7 Collectible Action Figures, Kids’ Toys for Boys & Girls Aged 3 and up
features: 7 COLLECTIBLE ACTION FIGURES: Elevate your PAW Patrol collection with this must-have gift set of seven play figures, showcasing Ryder and your favourite pups: Chase, Marshall, Skye, Rubble, Rocky and Zuma
AIR RESCUE FLIGHT SUITS: Each action figure features genuine PAW Patrol: Air Rescue styling and is decked out in their new team uniforms, so they all look just like they do in the show
IMAGINATIVE PLAY: Kids will love recreating scenes from their favourite PAW Patrol episodes and bringing their thrilling adventures to life with these exciting play figures (each sold separately)
COLLECT THEM ALL: For more fun, collect all of the PAW Patrol toys like the Air Rescue kids’ toys, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: PAW plush toys and toy cars are toys for girls and boys who enjoy building toys and gifts for kids aged 3 and up, as an alternative to dolls, dinosaur toys or train sets
